name: kubed-io/drupal-n8n-integration
description: Integration tests (Behat) for the n8n Drupal module. Isolated from the module's root composer so Behat's dependencies never constrain the module itself, and so a Drupal site can require the module without dragging Behat in. phpunit is here only for PHPUnit\Framework\Assert, which the step definitions assert with — Behat ships no assertion library of its own.
